title: the rizz
description: create/vanilla+ modpack to play with friends
body:
**What?**  
the rizz is a multiplayer mod pack with a slew of quality of life mods. inspired by hermitcraft and create perfection series, it adds proximity voice, replay mod, mapping, and some tweaks & recipes to enhance the base game. it's mostly intended to be used by my friends but is available for anyone to use

**Why?**  
you should download this project if you want to play on our server or host your own with the same functionality :D

**Warnings!**  
please don't update replay/replayvoice/voicechat mods yourself, as they are highly dependent on the current versioning


Credits:  
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
